recommendations.title: Waxwork II: Lost in Time
recommendations.overview: The survivors of the first Waxwork must use a portal through time to defeat the evil that has followed them and turned their lives upside down.

recommendations.title: Hellraiser III: Hell on Earth
recommendations.overview: Pinhead is set loose on the sinful streets of New York City to create chaos with a fresh cadre of Cenobitic kin.

recommendations.title: Warlock: The Armageddon

recommendations.title: Trainspotting

recommendations.title: Shiva Baby
recommendations.overview: College student Danielle must cover her tracks when she unexpectedly runs into her sugar daddy at a shiva - with her parents, ex-girlfriend and family friends also in attendance.

recommendations.title: The World of Apu
recommendations.overview: Apu, now a jobless ex-student dreaming vaguely of a future as a writer, is invited to join an old college friend on a trip up-country to a village wedding.
